title: Choup's Utils
description: Simple mod for my other projects that add 3 commands to travel between dimensions without portals !
body:
This mod is made for my other projects and adds 3 new commands :
-/end
-/nether
-/oveworld

And these commands do what they are named for ;))

I'll probably add other commands in the future with compatibilities for other mods but for the moment it stands just to help travelling though dimensions.



You can use it in your modpack of course and this mod do not act as a dependency
